positive: A whimsical, stylized forest scene featuring geometric flora and fauna, including highly detailed, symmetrical glowing mushrooms, graceful stylized deer, and meandering patterned streams. The overall aesthetic should be inspired by Art Deco botanicals mixed with Japanese Ukiyo-e woodblock prints. Use a highly contrasting, limited color palette of deep indigo, emerald green, gold leaf accents, and soft cream. Composition must be centrally framed for apparel, featuring strong silhouettes and clean negative space. Style: Vector illustration, digital painting, high saturation, elegant lines, cinematic lighting. Focus on clean lines and maximal print readability.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, low detail, bad anatomy, disfigured, noisy, messy, jpeg artifacts, grainy, logos, trademarks, poorly drawn limbs, poorly rendered details
